name: Save Our Rural Schools
summary: Draft home one-pager for the District 3 school consolidation coalition in Park County, WY.

name: About the Proposal
summary: What the consolidation plan covers: which schools, the timeline, and the budget savings.

name: Bus Route Impact
summary: Estimated ride times and stop maps for District 3 roads under the proposed routing.

name: How to Help
summary: Hearing dates, the sign-up form, and a template letter to the school board.

name: Op-Ed Archive
summary: Letters and op-eds to the Cody Enterprise on rural school consolidation.

name: Charles McKay
summary: Retired Cody rancher and Park County School Board member, District 3; coalition organizer.
